sys_update_version.name: sys_atf_step_f02a10dd8314c710bc5dccc6feaad3c5
sys_update_version.payload:
trueRun Server Side Validation ScriptRun Server Side Script141de4a935332120028bc29cac2dc349asys_atf_stepadmin2026-04-15 22:34:35f02a10dd8314c710bc5dccc6feaad3c53Run Server Side Scriptglobal54d4598f83b33210bc5dccc6feaad30csys_atf_step_f02a10dd8314c710bc5dccc6feaad3c5admin2026-04-15 22:54:48atf.server.runServerSideScript
45761c158314c710bc5dccc6feaad372sys_atf_stepf02a10dd8314c710bc5dccc6feaad3c5100sys_variable_valueadmin2026-04-15 22:34:35b02a10dd8314c710bc5dccc6feaad3d30admin2026-04-15 22:34:353.142f2564b73031300440211d8faf6a777sys_atf_stepf02a10dd8314c710bc5dccc6feaad3c5200sys_variable_valueadmin2026-04-15 22:34:35f42a10dd8314c710bc5dccc6feaad3d31admin2026-04-15 22:34:36(function(outputs, steps, params, stepResult, assertEqual) { var parser = new CF_EmailParsingUtils(); var input = '<table>' + '<tr><th>Item</th><th>Qty</th><th>Status</th></tr>' + '<tr><td>Laptop</td><td>1</td><td>Approved</td></tr>' + '<tr><td>Monitor</td><td>2</td><td>Pending</td></tr>' + '<tr><td>Keyboard</td><td>1</td><td>Approved</td></tr>' + '</table>'; var result = parser.parseHtmlTables(input); if (!Array.isArray(result)) { stepResult.setOutputMessage('FAIL: Expected Array result. Got: ' + typeof result); stepResult.setFailed(); return; } if (result.length !== 3) { stepResult.setOutputMessage('FAIL: Expected 3 data rows. Got: ' + result.length + '. Result: ' + JSON.stringify(result)); stepResult.setFailed(); return; } if (result[0]['Item'] !== 'Laptop' || result[0]['Status'] !== 'Approved') { stepResult.setOutputMessage('FAIL: Row 0 mismatch. Got: ' + JSON.stringify(result[0])); stepResult.setFailed(); return; } if (result[1]['Item'] !== 'Monitor' || result[1]['Status'] !== 'Pending') { stepResult.setOutputMessage('FAIL: Row 1 mismatch. Got: ' + JSON.stringify(result[1])); stepResult.setFailed(); return; } if (result[2]['Item'] !== 'Keyboard') { stepResult.setOutputMessage('FAIL: Row 2 mismatch. Got: ' + JSON.stringify(result[2])); stepResult.setFailed(); return; } stepResult.setOutputMessage('PASS: Multi-row table parsed correctly. Result: ' + JSON.stringify(result)); stepResult.setSuccess(); })(outputs, steps, params, stepResult, assertEqual);989d9e235324220002c6435723dc348454d4598f83b33210bc5dccc6feaad30c19d93519a820000001sys_atf_step_f02a10dd8314c710bc5dccc6feaad3c52.6Email Parsing Utilities54d4598f83b33210bc5dccc6feaad30cadmin2026-04-15 22:44:51df7cdc558354c710bc5dccc6feaad3820admin2026-04-15 22:44:51
